bssdm 0.2.2
  • Reference

Cleaned global occurrences of Hieracium pilosella (hawkweed)

Source: R/data.R
hawkweed.Rd

Species occurrence coordinates (WGS84) used in package examples. Records were downloaded from GBIF and cleaned with CoordinateCleaner (Zizka et al., 2019).

Usage

hawkweed

Format

A data frame with columns:

lon

Longitude (degrees).

lat

Latitude (degrees).

verified

Numeric flag from the cleaning workflow.

Source

GBIF.org (2026) GBIF Occurrence Download. doi:10.15468/dl.q6q6fk

References

Zizka, A., Silvestro, D., Andermann, T., Azevedo, J., Duarte Ritter, C., Edler, D., Farooq, H., Herdean, A., Ariza, M., Scharn, R., Svanteson, S., Wengstrom, N., Zizka, V., & Antonelli, A. (2019). 'CoordinateCleaner: standardized cleaning of occurrence records from biological collection databases.' Methods in Ecology and Evolution, 7. doi:10.1111/2041-210X.13152
